Title: The Ball Game
Summary: The first known baseball footage ever recorded by Thomas Edison. A short film depicting an 1898 game between Reading and Newark.

Title: Baseball and Bloomers
Summary: An all-girl baseball team uses two Harvard boys in disguise to win the big game.

Title: Headin' Home
Summary: A silent film starring the actual Babe Ruth playing himself. A fictionalized comedy about his rise to fame.

Title: The Pride of the Yankees
Summary: The legendary story of Lou Gehrig, starring Gary Cooper. 'Today, I consider myself the luckiest man on the face of the earth.'

Title: Bang the Drum Slowly
Summary: Robert De Niro stars as a catcher with a terminal illness in this heart-wrenching classic.

Title: The Bad News Bears
Summary: Walter Matthau coaches a team of misfits. The definitive Little League movie.

Title: The Bingo Long Traveling All-Stars & Motor Kings
Summary: James Earl Jones and Billy Dee Williams star in this classic about a barnstorming Negro League team.

Title: Bull Durham
Summary: Kevin Costner is Crash Davis. The greatest minor league movie ever made.

Title: Eight Men Out
Summary: The story of the 1919 Black Sox scandal. 'Say it ain't so, Joe.'

Title: Field of Dreams
Summary: If you build it, they will come. Kevin Costner builds a diamond in an Iowa cornfield.

Title: Major League
Summary: The Cleveland Indians are built to lose, but Charlie Sheen and Wesley Snipes have other plans.

Title: A League of Their Own
Summary: There's no crying in baseball. Tom Hanks and Geena Davis tell the story of the AAGPBL.

Title: The Sandlot
Summary: You're killing me, Smalls. A coming-of-age classic about baseball in the summer of 1962.

Title: Ken Burns: Baseball
Summary: The definitive 18-hour history of the game, chronicled by Ken Burns.
Billy Crystal directs the story of Mickey Mantle and Roger Maris chasing the home run record.

Title: Sugar
Summary: A Dominican prospect struggles to adjust to life in the United States. A critical darling.

Title: Moneyball
Summary: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt) changes the game forever with mathematics and budget constraints.
Chadwick Boseman is Jackie Robinson. Harrison Ford is Branch Rickey. The story of breaking the color barrier.

Title: No No: A Dockumentary
Summary: The psychedelic story of Dock Ellis, who pitched a no-hitter on LSD.

Title: The Battered Bastards of Baseball
Summary: The true story of the Portland Mavericks, a scrappy independent team owned by Bing Russell.

Title: Fastball
Summary: Kevin Costner narrates the scientific and historical quest to find the fastest pitch ever thrown.

Title: Shohei Ohtani: Beyond the Dream
Summary: The definitive look at the rise of the modern Babe Ruth, narrated by Pedro Martinez.
